name: The Schrödinger File System
image_sign_text: THE FILE IS IN THERE. PROBABLY.
effect: Exist in a state of simultaneous presence and absence. This card is considered current.

clauses.name: OBSERVATION COLLAPSE CLAUSE
clauses.rule: When a file is searched for: It is either found in an unexpected location or confirmed deleted by someone who cannot be reached.

clauses.name: VERSION UNCERTAINTY EFFECT
clauses.rule: If multiple versions exist: The correct version is considered the one opened most recently by the most senior stakeholder.

clauses.name: RETRIEVAL OVERRIDE
clauses.rule: When a file is declared missing: A copy surfaces in a folder no one recognized as active.

witness_quote: It was there last week, I swear.
